title: limeum viscosum
intro: Limeum viscosum, also known as sticky stem or sticky caltrop, is a plant species belonging to the family Zygophyllaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Limeum viscosum include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating infections and reducing inflammation. Limeum viscosum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to create ointments and salves for topical application.
